checkin.journal:
Feeling great apart from my dhiarea still returning back today after lunch, I did eat beans - i mean the day i decide to break the diet man, but yeah overall was a good day, I was enjoying the snow and the cold, did some meetings but not much, got upset - definitely could see how that hurts my emotional balance hehe but overall this period for me is very relaxing
